142: And when my body passes from this world, Dartorgor and I will live on within <Emphasis>you</Emphasis>. Within you, and within those who carry on the Pact after us.

143: And now, I know you were promised flowers. Let us view them together─the story of that moment shall be the next to be inscribed on the sepulchre.
